en: A: Who are you?
A: Who are you?

ab: yaken am, si Masarey ko, anak nyaman Somakey.
ch: B:我是syaman Somakey的兒子，我叫si Masarey。
en: B:I am the son of syaman Somakey, my name is si Masarey.
A: Who are you?

ab: si Masarey ko, yamnanao jiyaken am, syaman Mateneng.
ch: B:我是syaman Matenen的學生，我叫si Msarey。
en: B:I am a student of syaman Matenen, my name is si Msarey.
A: What’s your name?

ab: O ngaran ko am, si Masarey.
en: B:My name is si Msarey.
A: What’s your father’s name?

ab: ngaran ni ama am, syaman Somakey.
en: B: My father’s name is Syaman somakey.
A: Who is he?
B: He was si Matopo.

ab: si kaka ko ori. si Matopos.
ch: B:他是我的哥哥，他叫si Matopos。
en: B: He’s my brother, his name is si Matopo.
A: What’s his name?

ab: o ngaran na am, si Matopos.
en: B: His name is si Matopo.

ab: o ngaran na am, si Monot?
ch: A:他的名字是, si Monot嗎?
en: A: His name is, si Manaik.

ch: B:是，他的名字是 si Manaik。
en: B: Yes, his name is si Manaik.
A: Is his name si Manaik?

ab: beken, o ngaran na am, si Matopos.
en: B:No, his name is si Matopos.
A: Who is that guy?
B: She is sinan Maomey. she is my aunt.
A: Who is that guy?
B:She is my friend and her name is si Mangato.
A: How old are you?

ab: ya asa ngarnan o kakawakawan ko.
en: B: I am 10 years old.
A: How old is he?

ab: ya adowa o ikarwa no kakawakawan na.
en: B: He is 12 years old.
A: How old is your father?

ab: ya lima ngarnan o kakawakawan ni ama.
en: B: My father is 50 years old.
A: How many brothers and sisters do you have?

ab: yararwa sira kaka, yasa si wari.
ch: B:我有兩個兄姐，一個弟妹。
en: B: I have two brothers and sisters and one younger brother and sister.

ab: yamyan si kaka mo a mahakey?
en: A: Do you have a brother?
B: I don’t have a brother.
A: How many people are in your family?
B: There are four of us in our family.
A: Where did you study?
B: I studied in Taitung.
